title: Old Town Private Walking Tour Šibenik | Private Walking Tours by Ivana
description: Private walking tour of Šibenik Old Town with a licensed local guide. Medieval streets, the UNESCO Cathedral of St. James, and hidden corners. 1.5–2 hours, €150 per group.
keywords: Šibenik old town walking tour, private walking tour Šibenik, Šibenik cathedral tour, licensed guide Šibenik
